出生於美國丶年僅19歲的干拿特．迪拉芬特(Konrad De La Fuente)是第一位為巴塞一隊上陣的美國人，他父母是海地人。司職翼鋒的他在2012年跟隨父母來到巴塞隆拿，並在一年後加盟拉瑪西亞青訓學院，並於去季季尾開始在B隊得到上陣機會，憑着出色表現獲得關注，他去季共上陣21場入7球交出3個助攻。目前是美國U20國家隊成員。

OFFICIAL:

This afternoon, member Jordi Farré, promoter of the vote of censure against the FC Barcelona Board of Directors, has delivered the signatures of the club members who support his request to the offices of the Barcelona Supporter Services Office (OAB).

The corresponding count has been made, and a total of 20,687 signatures have been counted.

The vote of censure procedure is governed by article 55 of the FC Barcelona Statutes.

Article 55.1: In this case, the party affected by the vote of censure are all members of the current Board of Directors.

Article 55.2: The number of endorsements presented exceeds 15% of members with the right to vote on the day of the presentation of the announcement of the vote, set at 16,520.

Article 55.3: These signatures have been delivered within the period of 14 working days, counted from the day following the day that ballot papers were provided.

Article 55.4: From now, a period of ten working days is set for the constitution of the Vote of Censure Board, made up of two members of the FC Barcelona Board of Directors, the first two signatories of the application, and a delegate of the Catalan Football Federation.

Once it has been set up, it must, within a maximum period of ten working days, verify that the application meets the requirements to which it is subject and, in particular, that it has the appropriate backing and support of a sufficient number of members or delegates. The Board may invalidate any ballot papers that are not sufficiently accredited and may make whatever inquiries are necessary in order to ascertain their authenticity.

If all the requirements have been met, the application will be declared valid and the FC Barcelona Board of Directors shall be obliged to convene a vote, which shall be held within a period of not less than ten working days and not more than twenty. If all the requirements have not been met, the application for a vote of censure shall be rejected.

Source: https://www.fcbarcelona.com/en/club/news/1833645/fc-barcelona-official-announcement

疫情之下，各大足球俱樂部收入銳減，日子都不好過，但在應對危機方面，各俱樂部的水平也不一樣，比如西甲兩大豪門，巴薩俱樂部虧損嚴重，皇馬方面卻仍略有盈餘。
近日，巴薩證實，疫情到目前為止已使俱樂部損失了約3億歐元，並迫使他們對新賽季的預算進行了一些調整。巴薩曾希望成為第一家賽季收入突破10億歐元的足球俱樂部，直到今年3月前都很有希望，然而疫情迫使足球停擺3個月，這導致了俱樂部收入銳減。
除了比賽日收入的損失外，巴薩還不得不關閉俱樂部的博物館和俱樂部商店，這些商店每年帶來數百萬歐元的收入。電視轉播權和讚助收入也有進一步的損失。

因此，巴薩俱樂部估計，2019-20賽季，他們的收入減少3億歐元，而此前他們的估計是收入略高於10億歐元。根據西甲方面發布的會計報告可以看出，巴薩在2019-20賽季的虧損額度達到了9800萬歐元。
這將對俱樂部的預算產生影響。除非賣掉一些球員，否則巴薩將無法購買任何新球員，儘管新教練科曼希望引進新面孔。
與此同時，皇馬方面披露，2019-20賽季球隊的收入雖然也大幅下降，但皇馬仍然獲得32萬歐元的盈利。據悉，皇馬上賽季的收入減少了1.72億歐元，但依靠俱樂部高層在特殊情況下合理的經營政策，皇馬最終還是得以盈餘32萬歐元，成功達到收支平衡。
